arts.ttl: Unai Emery explains Aston Villa's Louie Barry transfer plan amid Leeds United and Sunderland links
arts.sum: After recalling Barry from his loan at Stockport County, where he netted 15 goals in 23 League One matches and topped the scoring charts above Birmingham City's Jay Stansfield, Emery faces a decision on the young forward's future. Unai Emery is set to take a close look at Louie Barry's capabilities before deciding the best path forward for the Aston Villa ace.

arts.ttl: Louie Barry Leeds United transfer latest after Aston Villa decision and Sunderland hint
arts.sum: One player that the Whites and other Championship clubs have been linked with is Aston Villa's Louie Barry. The youngster has just returned to Villa Park after a successful loan spell at League One side Stockport County.

arts.ttl: “Not a big dream of mine” – Midfielder appears to dismiss move to Leeds United under Daniel Farke
arts.sum: Leeds United currently find themselves top of the Championship table and in a very good position to go on and seal promotion to the Premier League. Of course, it won’t be the first time Daniel Farke has taken a team to England’s top flight, having done so previously with Norwich City. arts.ttl: Abu Kamara responds to Hull City critics at unusual press conference as Leeds United loom
arts.sum: Kamara was roundly criticised for his part in Middlesbrough's 93rd-minute winning goal on Wednesday night, along with skipper Lewie Coyle, allowing Delano Burgzorg to breeze into the Tigers penalty area before cutting the ball back for Alex Gilbert to slot into the net. Hull City winger Abu Kamara is determined to open his account for the club today when the Tigers host rivals Leeds United and respond perfectly to his critics.

arts.ttl: Jack Harrison: Will Everton cut Leeds loan short?
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Jack Harrison was a key target for Sean Dyche’s Everton during the summer, but his second successive loan is not looking like a successful one at this stage. Given Harrison’s initial four-year Leeds deal would be concluding next summer, the worry of making a PSR loss on Harrison is in the past, and any sale from hereon could represent a boost for Leeds’ standing on that front.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Hull City as Daniel Farke faces major defensive dilemma
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Leeds United postponement latest as Met Office issues weekend weather warning
arts.sum: A weather update has been issued ahead of Leeds United's return to Championship action this weekend. The Met Office has issued warnings for snow and ice on both Saturday and Sunday across the UK.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Hull City vs. Leeds United
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Hull City vs. Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Jones on the Hull City dressing room mood ahead of Leeds test
arts.sum: Alfie Jones admits there was a lot of anger and frustration inside Hull City's dressing room after they gifted three points to Middlesbrough on Wednesday night, and says it's vital the Tigers look to respond against Leeds United this afternoon. Few outside of the Tigers dressing room will give Ruben Selles' side much of a chance against the table-topping Whites, but Jones says a good starting point to being more competitive will be getting the press right and building from there.
